summary: Iteration 138 - Advisor Watchtower & Soundboard Testing. Backend tests: 18/19 passed. Soundboard chat API returns 503 due to AI provider keys being placeholder values (CONFIGURED_IN_AZURE). Frontend testing confirmed: Role-based personalization selector (CEO dropdown), Integration onboarding prompts working, Decision cards with domain tabs (Market/Revenue/Operations), Soundboard conversation UI functional. CRITICAL: Soundboard chat requires real OPENAI_API_KEY or GOOGLE_API_KEY - preview env has placeholder values.

advisor_executive_snapshot_live_context.findings: API endpoints work (/integrations/merge/connected returns live integration count, /workflows/delegate/providers returns health cards), but Soundboard chat fails with 503 due to AI key placeholder

advisor_decision_cards_no_fake_fallback.findings: Decision cards show real domain tabs (Market, Revenue, Operations). Soundboard shows WHY YOU ARE SEEING THIS/WHY THIS MATTERS NOW/WHAT TO DO NEXT cards with meaningful text, not vague placeholders

advisor_role_personalization_selector.findings: CEO dropdown visible at /advisor page, allows View as role selection

advisor_integration_onboarding_prompt.findings: Strategic Console shows 'Connect core systems to generate a live strategic brief' when viewing /watchtower. Also 'Connect integrations to unlock verified signals' on /advisor

delegate_provider_health_cards.findings: /workflows/delegate/providers returns recommended_provider, connected_business_tools with outlook_connected, gmail_connected, outlook_expired status fields

auth_callback_no_integration_routing.findings: Login redirects to /advisor which shows integration onboarding messaging when connections are needed

soundboard_conversation_persistence.findings: /soundboard/conversations returns list successfully, /soundboard/conversations/{id} returns conversation with messages

soundboard_chat_stability.findings: Soundboard chat returns 503 with error: 'AI provider keys are not configured. Add a valid OPENAI_API_KEY and/or GOOGLE_API_KEY'. Current backend has OPENAI_API_KEY=CONFIGURED_IN_AZURE which is rejected as placeholder value

critical.issue: Returns 503 - AI provider keys are placeholders (OPENAI_API_KEY=CONFIGURED_IN_AZURE)
critical.root_cause: config.py _has_configured_key() correctly rejects 'CONFIGURED_IN_AZURE' as invalid. Preview env needs real keys.

minor.issue: Merge API timeout (504) or unauthorized (401) when account token expires
ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED causing 60+ console errors on /integrations - cosmetic only

issues: Clearbit logo service failing (ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED) - logos show fallback text initials

action_items: CRITICAL: Set real OPENAI_API_KEY or GOOGLE_API_KEY in backend/.env to enable Soundboard chat
OPTIONAL: Cache integration logos locally to avoid Clearbit service failures
critical_code_review_comments: Soundboard correctly rejects placeholder AI keys with clear error message - this is good defensive coding
Delegate provider health cards properly expose token expiry status for reconnect messaging

success_rate.frontend: 90% (all pages load, soundboard chat blocked by AI key)

seed_data_creation: None required - using existing user data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs verified working for Advisor Watchtower features. Soundboard conversation persistence works. Soundboard chat requires real AI keys - currently returns 503. Clearbit logo errors are cosmetic. Integration health cards and reconnect messaging working via /workflows/delegate/providers.

soundboard_503_error.root_cause: OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable is set to 'CONFIGURED_IN_AZURE' which is rejected by _has_configured_key() in core/config.py as a placeholder value
reproduction_steps: 4. Observe 503 error with message about AI keys not configured
soundboard_503_error.mitigation: Set a valid OPENAI_API_KEY or GOOGLE_API_KEY in the backend/.env file
